{
  "claims": [
    "There are serious negative effects on young people who are exposed to pornographic material.",
    "Regular consumption of pornographic material by young people can lead to addiction at a young age.",
    "The consequences of early child exposure to pornographic material ripple out into future generations and society at large.",
